description: 1. Cool cushy mid-sole for comfort and support 2. Rubber out-sole for maximum grip 3. Unisex style 4. Leather upper for long wear and good looks                                                                                                        5. Chocolate brown silver metallic colour            Just think of this: You, your gang of friends, these exclusive Ducati-puma shoes! Need we say more? These Ducati sneakers up the style quotient when you and your stylish friends decide to paint the town red.
